pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or run on JDK 17 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the unified release configuration in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 17+ is deprecated and may cause warnings or errors; release is the standard for modern Java.
